title: selaginella caffrorum var. caffrorum
intro: Selaginella caffrorum var. caffrorum, a species of the Selaginella genus, is a type of spore-producing plant also known as the Caffrorum spikemoss. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, with its extracts displaying potential in treating various health issues such as inflammation and oxidative stress. The health benefits of Selaginella caffrorum var. caffrorum include its ability to reduce blood pressure, lower cholesterol levels, and exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
